title: Department Overview
description: Quarterly performance across STORE, AAONE, AATWO, CONNECT — efficiency, quality, transparency.

panels.title: Data Age
panels.description: Hours since last Jira sync. Green ≤ 12 h · Yellow 12–24 h · Red > 24 h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-finished_at))/3600.0,1) AS "Age (h)", UPPER(status) AS "Status" FROM sync_log WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Total story points delivered by department this quarter.
panels.title: SP Delivered

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_delivered AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_completed = TRUE GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sd.sp),0) AS value
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_delivered sd ON sd.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state='closed'
  AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)

panels.description: % of committed SP delivered across all teams.
panels.title: Delivery %

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_committed AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_punted = FALSE GROUP BY sprint_id
),
sprint_delivered AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_completed = TRUE GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(COALESCE(sd.sp,0))/NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(sc.sp,0)),0),1) AS value
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_committed sc ON sc.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_delivered sd ON sd.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state='closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)

panels.description: New bugs logged across all teams this quarter.
panels.title: Bugs Created

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)

panels.description: % of bugs from this quarter that are resolved.
panels.title: Bug Resolution %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS value
FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)

panels.description: % of Stories/Tasks/Improvements with SP + AC + assignee. Only shown for quarters >= $readiness_valid_from (when tracking was introduced).
panels.title: Story Readiness %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.story_points IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(i.has_acceptance_criteria,FALSE)=TRUE AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS value
FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  AND i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement') AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')
  AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)) _q WHERE (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int))

panels.description: % of resolved issues with a QASE test link. Only shown for quarters >= $readiness_valid_from (when tracking was introduced).
panels.title: QASE Coverage %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link=TRUE)
  /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL),0),1) AS value
FROM issues i WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won')
  AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)) _q WHERE (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int))

panels.description: Avg story points delivered per sprint per team. Blue = selected quarter, gray = previous quarter.
panels.title: Avg Velocity (SP/sprint)

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_delivered AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_completed = TRUE GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT pp.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(sd.sp,0)),0) AS "This Q"
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_delivered sd ON sd.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state = 'closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY pp.project_key ORDER BY pp.project_key

WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_delivered AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_completed = TRUE GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT pp.project_key AS metric, ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(sd.sp,0)),0) AS "Prev Q"
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_delivered sd ON sd.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state = 'closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY pp.project_key ORDER BY pp.project_key

panels.description: % of committed SP delivered per team.
panels.title: Delivery % (Committed → Delivered)

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_committed AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_punted = FALSE GROUP BY sprint_id
),
sprint_delivered AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_completed = TRUE GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT pp.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*SUM(COALESCE(sd.sp,0))/NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(sc.sp,0)),0),1) AS "This Q"
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_committed sc ON sc.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_delivered sd ON sd.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state='closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY pp.project_key ORDER BY pp.project_key

WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_committed AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_punted = FALSE GROUP BY sprint_id
),
sprint_delivered AS (
  SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points,0)) AS sp
  FROM sprint_scope_final WHERE was_completed = TRUE GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT pp.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*SUM(COALESCE(sd.sp,0))/NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(sc.sp,0)),0),1) AS "Prev Q"
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_committed sc ON sc.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN sprint_delivered sd ON sd.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state='closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY pp.project_key ORDER BY pp.project_key

panels.description: Average days from issue creation to resolution.
panels.title: Avg Lead Time (days)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at-i.created_at))/86400.0),1) AS "This Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at-i.created_at))/86400.0),1) AS "Prev Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.description: New bugs per team this quarter, stacked by priority.
panels.title: Bugs Created by Priority

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "Blocker"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND i.priority='Blocker' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "Critical"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND i.priority='Critical' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "High"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND i.priority='High' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "Medium"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND i.priority='Medium' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "Low"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug'
  AND i.priority='Low' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.description: % of bugs from this quarter resolved, per team.
panels.title: Bug Resolution %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS "This Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS "Prev Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type='Bug' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.description: % of resolved issues with QASE test link, per team. Only shown for quarters >= $readiness_valid_from (when tracking was introduced).
panels.title: QASE Coverage %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link=TRUE)/NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL),0),1) AS "This Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key) _q WHERE (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int))

SELECT * FROM (SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link=TRUE)/NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL),0),1) AS "Prev Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key) _q WHERE (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int))

panels.description: % of Stories/Tasks/Improvements with SP + AC + assignee at creation. Only shown for quarters >= $readiness_valid_from (when tracking was introduced).
panels.title: Story Readiness %

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.story_points IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(i.has_acceptance_criteria,FALSE)=TRUE AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL)
  /NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS "This Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement')
  AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key) _q WHERE (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int))

SELECT * FROM (SELECT i.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.story_points IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(i.has_acceptance_criteria,FALSE)=TRUE AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL)
  /NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS "Prev Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement')
  AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key) _q WHERE (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int))

panels.description: Mid-sprint additions as % of initial sprint scope.
panels.title: Scope Change Rate %

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_scope AS (
  SELECT sprint_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE was_in_initial_scope=TRUE) AS initial,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE was_in_initial_scope=FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL) AS added
  FROM sprint_issues GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT pp.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*SUM(ss.added)/NULLIF(SUM(ss.initial),0),1) AS "This Q"
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
JOIN sprint_scope ss ON ss.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state='closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY pp.project_key ORDER BY pp.project_key

WITH sprint_proj AS (
  SELECT si.sprint_id, i.project_key, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT')
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id, i.project_key
),
primary_proj AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (sprint_id) sprint_id, project_key
  FROM sprint_proj ORDER BY sprint_id, cnt DESC
),
sprint_scope AS (
  SELECT sprint_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE was_in_initial_scope=TRUE) AS initial,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE was_in_initial_scope=FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL) AS added
  FROM sprint_issues GROUP BY sprint_id
)
SELECT pp.project_key AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0*SUM(ss.added)/NULLIF(SUM(ss.initial),0),1) AS "Prev Q"
FROM sprints s JOIN primary_proj pp ON pp.sprint_id = s.id
JOIN sprint_scope ss ON ss.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.state='closed' AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.start_date)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM s.start_date)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY pp.project_key ORDER BY pp.project_key

panels.description: Count of non-epic/sub-task issues resolved per team.
panels.title: Issues Resolved (Throughput)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "This Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

SELECT i.project_key AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS "Prev Q"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.resolved_at)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.resolved_at)::int = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM (MAKE_DATE(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int,(SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int-1)*3+1,1) - INTERVAL '3 months'))::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key ORDER BY i.project_key

panels.title: Team Scorecard — $quarter
panels.description: All key metrics per team for selected quarter. Dept Total = aggregate across all 4 teams.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  i.project_key AS "Team",
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL) AS "Resolved",
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type='Bug') AS "Bugs",
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type='Bug' AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL)
    /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type='Bug'),0),1) AS "Bug Res %",
  CASE WHEN (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int)) THEN
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement')
    AND i.story_points IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(i.has_acceptance_criteria,FALSE)=TRUE AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL)
    /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement')),0),1)
  ELSE NULL END AS "Readiness %",
  CASE WHEN (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int > SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int OR (SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int = SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',1)::int AND SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int >= SPLIT_PART('$readiness_valid_from','-Q',2)::int)) THEN
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link=TRUE)
    /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL),0),1)
  ELSE NULL END AS "QASE %",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at-i.created_at))/86400.0) FILTER(WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')),1) AS "Lead Time (d)"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
GROUP BY i.project_key
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DEPT TOTAL',
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task') AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL),
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type='Bug'),
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type='Bug' AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL)
    /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type='Bug'),0),1),
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement')
    AND i.story_points IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(i.has_acceptance_criteria,FALSE)=TRUE AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL)
    /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.issue_type IN ('Story','Task','Improvement')),0),1),
  ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link=TRUE)
    /NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE i.has_qase_link IS NOT NULL),0),1),
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at-i.created_at))/86400.0) FILTER(WHERE i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')),1)
FROM issues i
WHERE i.project_key IN ('STORE','AAONE','AATWO','CONNECT') AND LOWER(i.status) NOT IN ('obsolete', 'won''t do', 'obsolete / won''t do', 'obsolete / won') AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',1)::int AND EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM i.created_at)::int = SPLIT_PART('$quarter','-Q',2)::int)
ORDER BY "Team"

list.label: Jira URL
list.name: jira_url
list.query: SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'jira_url'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)::int || '-Q' || EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM start_date)::int AS quarter FROM sprints WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL AND state != 'future' ORDER BY quarter DESC
list.label: Quarter
list.name: quarter
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)::int || '-Q' || EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM start_date)::int AS quarter FROM sprints WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL AND state != 'future' ORDER BY quarter DESC
